verdict: All checks pass — format, length (872 words, ~4.4 min), citations, no forward refs, beginner readability, scope, and faithfulness are clean.

format_discipline.detail: First non-empty line is '# Making the first API call…' (no frontmatter). reading.meta.json exists, parses, and carries all required fields (word_count, estimated_read_minutes, citations_used, sections). Exactly 6 required sections present in correct order: Overview / Key Concepts / Worked Example / In Practice / Key Takeaways / References.

length_budget.detail: 872 words is within [800, 1200]. At 200 wpm reading rate: 872 / 200 = 4.36 min, within [4, 6]. Sidecar reports 872 words / 5 min estimated; both consistent.

citation_discipline.detail: Primary resource [1] (Anthropic Colab notebook) is cited in Overview (line 5), Key Concepts (lines 9, 15, 30, 34), Worked Example (lines 65, 83, 98, 113), and In Practice (lines 117, 120, 121). [2] (PyPI page) cited at lines 13, 65, 117. [3] (SDK GitHub) cited at lines 13, 30, 53, 118, 119. No orphan inline markers; no orphan bibliography entries. Bibliography entries 1–3 match inline usage exactly.

no_forward_references.detail: No references to 12.12 (JSON parsing), 12.13 (error handling / try-except), or 12.14 (latency/cost optimisation) were found. stop_reason and usage fields are part of the response object taught within 12.11's own scope (corpus sections 5.5–5.6). All prerequisite concepts (variables, dicts, lists, indexing, functions, API, messages array, API key) trace to topics 12.1–12.10.

beginner_readability.detail: All non-everyday terms defined on first use with bold + plain-language parenthetical: library/package (line 13), SDK (line 13), pip (line 15), client (line 23), environment variable (line 30), tokens (line 34), max_tokens (line 34), method (line 38). No paragraph introduces 3+ new terms simultaneously. Concrete examples (code snippets) precede abstract descriptions throughout Key Concepts. No hedging phrases detected. Average sentence length is short and imperative. No assessment references (A-IDs, due weeks, grade weights) found.

scope.detail: Reading stays on the headline: install (!pip install anthropic) → import + client (anthropic.Anthropic()) → max_tokens → messages.create() → run in Colab → .content[0].text. Cell 5 (stop_reason, usage) is within scope because corpus section 5.5 explicitly teaches those response fields as part of 'running the call and reading the raw response object'. No scope creep into error handling, JSON parsing, cost management, streaming, or async patterns.

faithfulness.detail: 10 assertions sampled across Overview, Key Concepts, Worked Example, and In Practice sections. All 10 trace directly to corpus sections 4, 5.1, 5.2, 5.3, 5.4, 5.5, 5.6, 6, 7, and 8. No new claims introduced that are absent from the corpus. The reading is a faithful condensed pass over the corpus material.
